patch.value: Remove dead code: command-aware.ts module, 5 orphaned exported functions, unused undici dependency

Code-quality audit (grep-verified zero call sites). Deleted src/core/output/command-aware.ts (389 LOC, orphaned by commit 5211414a; was explicitly allowlisted in static-quality-gate as zero-incoming-import). Removed dead exports getActiveCommandContext, applyDynamicExtensionOptions, normalizeCalendarOptions, listDocumentedHelpPaths, uniqueTokens. Removed unused direct dependency undici (^8.1.0; zero imports, only transitive undici@6 via @sentry/node remains). Updated the coverage-include allowlist and static-gate allowlist accordingly.
All dead symbols removed with zero remaining references; build/typecheck/static-gate green; 100% coverage maintained.

Removed src/core/output/command-aware.ts (389 LOC) + 5 orphaned exports + unused undici dep; updated coverage-include and static-gate allowlists. Build/typecheck/static-gate green, 100% coverage maintained.
